roles.name: Tietäjä — Knower of Runes
roles.description: Sage of ancient runo-songs — chants the over-arching Salesforce solution into being and guards its harmony.

roles.name: Päällikkö of the Voyage
roles.description: Captain of the longboat — sets the rowing cadence, holds the timeline, and answers to the Mistress.

roles.name: Keeper of the Sampo Ledger
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, and permission sets — turns the mill of daily configuration.

roles.name: Seppo of the Anvil
roles.description: Smith at the forge — hammers Apex, LWC, and platform features under the smoke of Ilmarinen's bellows.

roles.name: Ilmarinen Master Smith
roles.description: Forger of the Sampo itself — leads the most intricate Salesforce builds west of the Pohjola gates.

roles.name: Loremaster of Väinölä
roles.description: Elder of the singing-grove — sets standards across all Salesforce craft and mentors the senior smiths.

roles.name: Rune-Singer of Karelia
roles.description: Walks the borderlands of customer requirements with practiced kantele in hand.

roles.name: Apprentice Singer of Kalevala
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the marsh and pine under the Rune-Singer's eye.

roles.name: Junior Apprentice of the Grove
roles.description: Learns the first verses — declarative work, simple flows, and the quiet patience of the apprentice.

roles.name: Bridge-Wright of the Tuonela Stream
roles.description: Architect of the great spans across the dark river — designs every pipe between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Bridge-Builder of Pohjola
roles.description: Lays the planks of API, middleware, and event flow under the Bridge-Wright's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Plank-Layer
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the swamp-paths of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of Kipuvuori
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds the maladies on Pain Mountain before they reach the king.

roles.name: Herald of the Kantele
roles.description: Lifts the song and the bell for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Singer of Northern Campaigns
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather the heroes for the next launch.

roles.name: Bard of the Wayside
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily verse.

roles.name: Council Scribe of the Sampo Hall
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the rune-songs of design.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Ukko & Nature — Sky and Forest Telemetry Platform

kalevala-heroes.themedRole: Council Scribe of the Sampo Hall

pohjola-the-north.themedRole: Council Scribe of the Sampo Hall

tuonela-and-spirits.themedRole: Council Scribe of the Sampo Hall

kalevala-heroes.name: Singing the World into Being
kalevala-heroes.description: Discovery sign-off — Väinämöinen sings the project scope into shape.

kalevala-heroes.name: Bellows Lit at Ilmarinen's Forge
kalevala-heroes.description: Build kickoff: the great forge fires up for the Sampo.

kalevala-heroes.name: Sampo Lid Engraved
kalevala-heroes.description: Mid-project gate: the lid of many colours is reviewed by the council.

kalevala-heroes.name: Voyage to Pohjola
kalevala-heroes.description: Phase invoice trigger: the heroes set sail to deliver the mill.

kalevala-heroes.name: Sampo Goes to Sea
kalevala-heroes.description: Go-Live: the Sampo is launched (and predictably shattered).

kalevala-heroes.name: Fragments to the Shore
kalevala-heroes.description: Hyper-care close: the broken pieces wash ashore and bring fortune to the land.

pohjola-the-north.name: Audience with Louhi
pohjola-the-north.description: Project kickoff: terms set in the cold hall of the Mistress.

pohjola-the-north.name: Bride-Price Negotiated
pohjola-the-north.description: Build phase: the suitors' tasks accepted into the backlog.

pohjola-the-north.name: Iron Gates Tested
pohjola-the-north.description: UAT gate: the gates of Pohjola hold against the heroes.

pohjola-the-north.name: Sampo Locked in the Stone Mountain
pohjola-the-north.description: Go-Live: the great mill installed beneath the copper mountain.

pohjola-the-north.name: Hand-off to the Maid
pohjola-the-north.description: Hyper-care close: the Maid of Pohjola takes the keys.

pohjola-the-north.name: Final Tribute
pohjola-the-north.description: Final invoice: gold and grain rendered to the North.

ukko-and-nature-deities.name: Ukko Strikes the First Spark
ukko-and-nature-deities.description: Discovery: a thunderbolt lights the project to life.

ukko-and-nature-deities.name: Tapio Names the Forest Beasts
ukko-and-nature-deities.description: Build: every animal record catalogued by the forest god.

ukko-and-nature-deities.name: Ahti Audits the Tides
ukko-and-nature-deities.description: Solution review with the sea-king himself.

ukko-and-nature-deities.name: Storm Network Activation
ukko-and-nature-deities.description: Go-Live: thunder, rain, and wind telemetry fully online.

ukko-and-nature-deities.name: Mielikki's Stewardship Begins
ukko-and-nature-deities.description: Project close: the forest goddess assumes ongoing care.

ukko-and-nature-deities.name: Tribute to the Sky
ukko-and-nature-deities.description: Final invoice — paid in honey, milk, and harvest grain.

tuonela-and-spirits.name: Council in the Halls of Tuoni
tuonela-and-spirits.description: Kickoff in the dim hall by the black river.

tuonela-and-spirits.name: Ferryman Engaged
tuonela-and-spirits.description: Discovery: the ferry of souls contracted for the migration.

tuonela-and-spirits.name: Bridge Half-Built
tuonela-and-spirits.description: Build: planks join above the dark water.

tuonela-and-spirits.name: Loviatar's Acceptance
tuonela-and-spirits.description: UAT acceptance — the mother of plagues signs off the data quality.

tuonela-and-spirits.name: Crossing Opened
tuonela-and-spirits.description: Go-Live + handoff: souls cross the new bridge unaided.

tuonela-and-spirits.name: Final Recompense
tuonela-and-spirits.description: Final invoice — paid in cold coin and quiet song.

Väinämöinen.notes: Retreat to compose new runo-songs at the river-bend.

Ilmarinen.notes: Forge maintenance — re-lining the bellows after the Sampo work.

Lemminkäinen.notes: Recovery in the river of Tuonela — pieced back together by his mother.

Aino.notes: Quiet days by the lake — no suitors permitted.

Kullervo.notes: Brooding in the wood — kin matters demand attention.

Louhi.notes: Inspecting the iron gates and re-counting the hoard.

Iku-Turso.notes: Submerged in the deep — annual abyssal hibernation.

Maid of Pohjola.notes: Weaving the rainbow cloth — quarterly task.

Ukko.notes: Sky audit — re-stringing the thunder bow.

Ahti.notes: Tour of the seabed with Vellamo.

Mielikki.notes: Honey harvest in the deep glades.

Tuoni.notes: Closed-court week in the lower hall.

Loviatar.notes: Birthing of nine new diseases — full week of confinement.
